overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy. The clip begins with her swimming at the base of a waterfall, then traversing a tropical lagoon, followed by wading through a marshy pine forest, and finally approaching massive mechanical ruins in a mountainous valley. The video showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with lush vegetation and water effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall pool at base of rocky cliff

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the top of the waterfall and a mechanical arch structure
character begins swimming away from the waterfall base toward open water

agents.ego_description: treading water at the base of a waterfall, then swimming away from the falls into the pool

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with green moss and vegetation
tall waterfall cascading down the rock face into the pool
curved metallic arch structure visible at the top of the waterfall
dark water at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character in a pool at the base of a tall waterfall enclosed by rocky cliffs. The camera tilts up to reveal a mechanical arch structure at the waterfall's crest against a bright sky, then tilts down as the character begins swimming away from the falls into the shadowy water.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical lagoon with clear turquoise water

events.description: water transitions from dark shadow to bright turquoise as the character swims into sunlit areas
small red fish jumps out of the water near the character

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through clear turquoise water toward a distant shore lined with palm trees

entered.detail: clear turquoise water with visible underwater details and light reflections
distant shore lined with palm trees and tropical vegetation
rocky outcrop covered in greenery marking the lagoon edge

segments.scene_description: The character swims through sunlit turquoise waters of a tropical lagoon, leaving the waterfall behind. The water transitions from dark to vibrant blue-green as a small fish jumps nearby, and distant palm tree shorelines become visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded pine forest with scattered ruins

events.description: abrupt transition from swimming in tropical water to walking in a flooded pine forest
character wades through shallow marsh water, navigating around trees and grass tufts

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water and tall grass in a misty pine forest, heading toward distant ruins

entered.detail: tall pine trees with thick trunks rising from the shallow water
shallow brown water covering the forest floor with reflections
tall green grass tufts growing in the marsh water
large fallen log partially submerged in the marsh water
collapsed wooden ruins visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: Following a transition from the tropical lagoon, the character is now wading through a misty flooded pine forest. She navigates through shallow marsh water around tree trunks and grass tufts, with broken wooden ruins visible in the distance and mountains looming in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with massive mechanical ruins and snow-capped mountains

events.description: emerging from the marsh onto a dry dirt path with clear views of mechanical ruins and mountains
approaching a massive mechanical Tallneck structure dominating the landscape

agents.ego_description: walking along a dry path toward a massive mechanical ruin, with snow-capped mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: dry dirt and gravel path winding through the grass
massive giraffe-like mechanical structure with a circular head and long neck
mountain range with snow-covered peaks under a partly cloudy blue sky
metal debris and broken parts scattered along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the marsh onto a dry dirt path in an open valley. She approaches a massive mechanical Tallneck structure that dominates the landscape, with snow-capped mountains rising in the background under a bright sky. The environment shifts from enclosed forest to expansive open terrain with scattered metal debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the secluded depths of a waterfall pool into a vast, open valley dominated by mechanical ruins. It begins with the camera tilting up toward a metallic arch at the crest of a waterfall before following the character as she swims away from the cliffs into shadowy waters. As she moves forward, the environment shifts into a sunlit tropical lagoon with vibrant turquoise water and distant palm shorelines. The scene then transitions into a misty, flooded pine forest where the character wades through shallow marshland and broken wooden ruins beneath looming mountains. Finally, the terrain opens up as she emerges from the forest onto a dry dirt path, leading toward a massive mechanical Tallneck structure set against a backdrop of snow-capped peaks.
